title: Joy Patel: Valedictorian Rap
description:
Joy Patel, co-valedictorian with Andres Badel of Deerfield Beach High School class of 2013, delivers his speech in the form of a rap. Joy is currently an undergraduate student at Duke University.

*To my subscribers, though this isn't a YTP, I am currently working on one. Joy is a good friend of mine and I'm doing this for him.
